ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "slug" TEXT /* Slug for the state (used in URLs) */,
  "code" TEXT /* Two-letter code of the state */,
  "nickname" TEXT /* Nickname of the state */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the state's official website */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Full name of the state abbreviation */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone(s) of the state */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the state was founded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the state */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the state */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the state */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Current governor's name */,
  "lieutenant_governor" TEXT /* Current lieutenant governor's name */,
  "attorney_general" TEXT /* Current attorney general's name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_details" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the state was admitted to the Union */,
  "admission_number" INTEGER /* Order number of the state's admission */,
  "act_of_congress" TEXT /* Act of Congress that admitted the state */,
  "president" TEXT /* President who signed the act */,
  "congressional_districts" INTEGER /* Number of congressional districts */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_details_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capital_cities" (
  "capital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capital city record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "city_url" TEXT /* URL to the capital city's official website */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the capital city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the capital city */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the capital city */,
  "mayor" TEXT /* Current mayor's name */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the capital city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the capital city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capital_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "population_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the state's population */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the population data was recorded */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constitution_links" (
  "constitution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constitution link record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "constitution_url" TEXT /* URL to the state's constitution */,
  "year_adopted" INTEGER /* Year the constitution was adopted */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constitution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constitution_links_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flag_links" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag link record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the state's flag image */,
  "adopted_year" INTEGER /* Year the flag was adopted */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flag_links_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seal_links" (
  "seal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seal link record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "seal_url" TEXT /* URL to the state's seal image */,
  "adopted_year" INTEGER /* Year the seal was adopted */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seal_links_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "map_links" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map link record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "map_url" TEXT /* URL to the state's map image */,
  "map_type" TEXT /* Type of map (e.g., political, topographic) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_links_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "landscape_background_links" (
  "landscape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each landscape background link record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "landscape_url" TEXT /* URL to the state's landscape background image */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the landscape image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("landscape_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landscape_background_links_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skyline_background_links" (
  "skyline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skyline background link record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "skyline_url" TEXT /* URL to the state's skyline background image */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the skyline image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skyline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skyline_background_links_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_links" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media link record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "twitter_url" TEXT /* URL to the state's Twitter profile */,
  "facebook_url" TEXT /* URL to the state's Facebook profile */,
  "instagram_url" TEXT /* URL to the state's Instagram profile */,
  "linkedin_url" TEXT /* URL to the state's LinkedIn profile */,
  "youtube_url" TEXT /* URL to the state's YouTube channel */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_links_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
